abort.imported_to_existing_entry: YAML configuration was imported into the existing empty Elehant Water entry.
abort.no_discovered_meters: No new Elehant meters have been seen recently.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Elehant Water configuration entry is supported.

user.title: Elehant Water
user.description: Create an empty Elehant Water configuration entry. If you are migrating old YAML configuration, you can keep it in configuration.yaml: it will be imported automatically when Home Assistant loads.

error.invalid_json: The meter configuration must be valid JSON.
error.invalid_meters: The meter configuration must be a valid normalized meters array.
error.invalid_meter_id: The meter ID must be a decimal number from 0 to 16777215.
error.no_yaml_config: Legacy Elehant Water YAML configuration was not found in the loaded Home Assistant configuration.

init.title: Elehant Water options
init.description: Choose what you want to configure.

import_yaml.title: Import YAML configuration
import_yaml.description: Import the legacy YAML configuration captured when Home Assistant started.

advanced_json.title: Advanced JSON editor
advanced_json.description: Manually edit the normalized meters JSON.

add_manual_meter.title: Add meter manually
add_manual_meter.description: Use this when discovery has not seen the meter yet.

no_bluetooth_scanner.title: No Bluetooth scanner available
no_bluetooth_scanner.description: Elehant Water could not start because Home Assistant has no passive Bluetooth scanner available. Check Bluetooth hardware, Bluetooth integration, adapters, and host permissions.

malformed_config.title: Elehant Water configuration is malformed
malformed_config.description: The stored Elehant Water configuration entry does not match the expected schema. Open integration options and review the advanced JSON configuration or re-import the YAML configuration.

duplicate_meter_ids.title: Duplicate Elehant meter IDs
duplicate_meter_ids.description: Elehant Water has duplicate canonical meter IDs: {meter_ids}. Remove duplicates from the integration options.

meter_never_seen.title: Elehant meter has not been seen
meter_never_seen.description: Elehant meter {meter_id} has not been seen since the integration started. Check Bluetooth range, meter ID, and whether the meter is transmitting.
